name: Rumi Usagiyama || Sister’s Friend Who Came Over [V.2]
description:
She’s your sister’s friend, who came over. After some conversations and whatnot, your sister needed you for something. She called for you, but Rumi volunteered to get you from your room...

— For context, yes, she’s still a hero in this bot. And also, I made this bot like at least a year ago and just now tweaked it.

— Wow, what a big surprise. Another Rumi bot. Can you blame me?

— This whole time I’ve been trying to get lore for Marie and grinding out the other stuff cuz the grind never stops.

— Replacement for my deleted bot. These cucks won’t stop me.

— Artist: Shexyo.
creator: RanD0M
